race.comment: BELIEVEITOR NOT (12) relished the big class drop from Group 1 company when she came from a similar barrier to this and raced three wide without cover but proved too strong last time out by 2.4 metres at Geelong. That was her first try at this distance. The stable is always hard to stop in Tasmania so with even luck she can strike again. MY BEAUTIFUL LIFE (2) broke her maiden in style at her most recent outing, leading from wider to score by 16 metres at this circuit and distance. Could take advantage of the low draw to go on with the job. ALOT LIKE PENDLES (5) is a Tassie newcomer from Victoria. Hasn't raced for five-and-a-half months but was readied with an easy trial win. Can measure up. OUR WILLOW (4) is right in the mix after finishing runner-up for the second time in a row last start, leading and boxing on solidly at Carrick.
